name: testing
appliesWhen: agent role is qa-reviewer OR any task that ships code with logic

officialRepos.name: vitest-dev/vitest
officialRepos.why: Recommended unit/component runner for TS/JS. Fake timers, parametrized it.each, coverage.

officialRepos.name: microsoft/playwright
officialRepos.why: E2E framework. Auto-wait, role locators, trace viewer, network interception.

officialRepos.name: testcontainers/testcontainers-node
officialRepos.why: Real Postgres/services in Docker for integration tests that need true SQL semantics.

officialRepos.name: mswjs/msw
officialRepos.why: Network-boundary mocking for deterministic tests without hitting real HTTP.

officialRepos.name: felangel/mocktail
officialRepos.why: Null-safe test doubles for Flutter/Dart unit and widget tests.

officialRepos.name: stryker-mutator/stryker-js
officialRepos.why: Mutation testing — the real measure of test quality beyond coverage %.
